prompt:
You are a QA tester for a Polish salon management SaaS app. Follow these steps EXACTLY in order. Do not skip steps. Report PASS/FAIL/SKIP for each numbered test.

The app is in Polish. Key translations: Wizyta=Appointment, Klient=Client, Usługa=Service, Pracownik=Employee, Zakończona=Completed, Zapisz=Save, Anuluj=Cancel, Wyślij=Send.

---

## STEP 1: ACCESS THE APP

Open this exact URL (includes auth bypass param — do NOT remove the query string):
https://simplisaloncloud-qz1kb9wva-lowcamotyli-1366s-projects.vercel.app/anastazja/dashboard?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc

If you see a Vercel login screen, click 'Continue as Guest' or look for a bypass option. The bypass param in the URL should handle it automatically.

You will be redirected to the app login. Log in with:
- Email: bartosz.rogala@yahoo.pl
- Password: staging-temp-pass

Confirm you see the dashboard for salon 'Anastazja'.

---

## STEP 2: FIND EXISTING TOKENS IN SMS LOGS

Navigate to: /anastazja/settings/notifications/logs
(Add ?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc to every URL you navigate to)

You should see two tabs: SMS and another. Look for messages sent to +48 575 011 093 (client: Bartosz Rogala).

Look for SMS messages containing links like:
- /survey/[some-token] — this is a satisfaction survey link
- /forms/pre/[some-token] — this is a pre-appointment form link
- /forms/fill/[some-token] — this is a custom form link
- /api/bookings/confirm/[some-token] — this is a booking confirmation link

Copy ALL token URLs you find. You will use them in tests below.

Also note: if any SMS shows status 'error' or 'failed', report it.

---

## STEP 3: TEST SATISFACTION SURVEY

If you found a /survey/[token] URL in Step 2, proceed. Otherwise mark all survey tests as SKIP (no token available).

For the survey URL, always append: ?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc

Test 3.1 — HAPPY PATH (full):
- Open the survey URL
- Fill in the star rating (click 4 or 5 stars)
- Fill in the NPS score (0-10 slider or buttons)
- Fill in the comment field with 'Test komentarz'
- Click submit button
- PASS if you see a thank-you screen ('Dziękujemy' or similar)

Test 3.2 — STARS ONLY:
- This test requires a fresh token. If you only have one token, skip this test.
- Click only stars, leave NPS and comment empty, submit
- PASS if submission succeeds

Test 3.3 — NO STARS, SUBMIT BLOCKED:
- Open the survey URL (fresh page load)
- Do NOT click any stars
- Check if submit button is disabled/greyed out
- PASS if button is disabled without stars

Test 3.4 — ALREADY SUBMITTED (token reuse):
- Open the same survey URL again after submitting in Test 3.1
- PASS if you see an 'already filled' message (not the survey form again)

Test 3.5 — INVALID TOKEN:
- Open: [base-url]/survey/invalid-token-xyz-123?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc
- PASS if you see a 404 or error page (not the survey form)

---

## STEP 4: SEND CUSTOM FORM TO CLIENT

The salon has a custom form called 'regeneracja brwi'. You need to send it to the test client to get a fill token.

Navigate to: /anastazja/forms?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc

You should see a list of forms. Find 'regeneracja brwi'.

Look for a 'Send' or 'Wyslij' or 'Wyslij do klienta' button/option on that form.
Click it. A dialog should appear asking for a client.
Search for 'Bartosz Rogala' and select them.
Send the form.

After sending, go back to SMS logs (/anastazja/settings/notifications/logs) and look for a new SMS to +48 575 011 093 containing a /forms/fill/[token] URL.

Copy that token URL. You will use it in Step 6.

If you cannot find a 'Send' button on the forms page, look inside the appointment details: go to /anastazja/calendar, find the appointment for Bartosz Rogala (March 23, 08:30, Strzyzenie damskie, Alex Rogala, status Zakonczona), open it, and look for a 'Forms' or 'Formularze' tab/button inside the appointment dialog.

---

## STEP 5: CREATE A FUTURE APPOINTMENT (for pre-appointment form test)

Navigate to: /anastazja/calendar?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc

Create a new appointment:
- Client: Bartosz Rogala
- Service: any available service
- Employee: any available employee
- Date: tomorrow (March 24, 2026)
- Time: 10:00
- Save the appointment

Note the appointment ID or confirmation. This appointment will be used to test the pre-appointment form.

---

## STEP 6: TEST CUSTOM FORM (/forms/fill/[token])

Use the token from Step 4. If no token was obtained, mark all tests as SKIP.

For all URLs add: ?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc

Test 6.1 — HAPPY PATH WITH SIGNATURE:
- Open the form URL
- You should see a form titled 'regeneracja brwi' with fields about medications/doctor care (radio buttons in Polish)
- Fill in all radio button fields (select any option for each)
- At the bottom find the signature pad (canvas area for drawing)
- Draw a signature (drag mouse/click to draw)
- Check the GDPR consent checkbox
- Click submit
- PASS if you see 'Formularz wypelniony' or similar success screen

Test 6.2 — REQUIRED FIELD VALIDATION:
- Open the same form URL again (fresh)
- Leave all fields empty
- Try to click submit
- PASS if you see validation errors (red text near empty required fields)

Test 6.3 — GDPR REQUIRED:
- Fill in all fields but do NOT check the GDPR consent checkbox
- Try to submit
- PASS if submit is blocked and GDPR consent error is shown

Test 6.4 — TOKEN REUSE:
- After submitting in Test 6.1, open the same URL again
- PASS if you see 'already submitted' or 410/error (not the form again)

Test 6.5 — INVALID TOKEN:
- Open: [base-url]/forms/fill/fake-token-000?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc
- PASS if you see an error/404 page

---

## STEP 7: TEST PRE-APPOINTMENT FORM (/forms/pre/[token])

Check SMS logs again for any /forms/pre/[token] URL found in Step 2. If none, also check after creating the appointment in Step 5 (the CRON might have fired).

If still no token available, mark all pre-appointment form tests as SKIP.

Test 7.1 — HAPPY PATH:
- Open the /forms/pre/[token] URL
- Fill in all visible fields
- Submit
- PASS if you see success screen

Test 7.2 — REQUIRED FIELD EMPTY:
- Open fresh, leave a required field empty, try submit
- PASS if inline validation error appears

Test 7.3 — DOUBLE SUBMIT:
- Submit successfully, then immediately try to submit again
- PASS if second submission shows 'already submitted' message

Test 7.4 — INVALID TOKEN:
- Open: [base-url]/forms/pre/bad-token?x-vercel-protection-bypass=rIsqg8tG3f6uqxH6SSjOrTPfAtn0NPuc
- PASS if error page shown

---

## STEP 8: TEST BOOKING CONFIRMATION LINK

If you found a /api/bookings/confirm/[token] URL in Step 2 from SMS logs:

Test 8.1:
- Open that URL
- PASS if you see a confirmation page (not a 404 or error)

If no such URL found, mark as SKIP.

---

## STEP 9: VERIFY REMINDER WAS SENT

Go back to SMS logs (/anastazja/settings/notifications/logs).

Check if there is an SMS to +48 575 011 093 that:
- Contains a reminder about the appointment on March 23, 2026 at 08:30
- Contains a confirmation link (/api/bookings/confirm/...)

Test 9.1: PASS if reminder SMS exists in logs. FAIL if no reminder found at all for this appointment.
Note: if reminder was sent, check what time it was sent vs appointment time.

---

## FINAL REPORT

Provide a table:
| Test | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| 3.1 Survey happy path | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 3.2 Survey stars only | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 3.3 Survey no stars blocked | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 3.4 Survey token reuse | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 3.5 Survey invalid token | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 6.1 Form happy path + signature | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 6.2 Form required validation | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 6.3 Form GDPR required | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 6.4 Form token reuse | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 6.5 Form invalid token | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 7.1 Pre-form happy path | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 7.2 Pre-form validation | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 7.3 Pre-form double submit | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 7.4 Pre-form invalid token | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 8.1 Booking confirmation link | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |
| 9.1 Reminder SMS in logs | PASS/FAIL/SKIP | |

Also list any bugs, unexpected errors, or UI issues found along the way.
